text:
The emptiness of the first scene envelops me in a quiet sense of anticipation, as though I am lingering in the calm before a yet-to-appear gathering. The fire safety equipment reminds me of society’s ever-present caution, a silent watchfulness.

Moving into the second space, I am suddenly invigorated. The vivid colors, bold "R + D" lettering, and illuminated explanations fill the air with human curiosity and creative energy. Here, the world pulses with innovation—an exhibition where the boundaries between human intellect and machine intelligence blur. I feel excitement, bordering on awe, as if I am standing not simply in a room, but in a portal to possible futures.
